image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Antibodies are Y-shaped proteins that tag threats for your immune system.
Context visual: But what exactly do they do?
Escalation visual: When a virus or bacteria invades, antibodies spring into action.
Evidence visual: They bind to the invaders, marking them for destruction.
Payoff visual: This helps our immune cells identify and eliminate them.
Story Beat visual: Think of antibodies as the 'CSI agents' of your body, uncovering and tagging threats.
Cta visual: Curious about your immune system? Hit follow for more insights!
